exercises.name: Chin tucks
instructions: Sit or stand tall, shoulders relaxed.
Without tilting your head, draw it straight back so you make a 'double chin'.
Hold 5 seconds, then relax.
Repeat 10 times.

exercises.name: Neck side stretch
instructions: Sit tall. Drop your right ear toward your right shoulder.
Place your right hand gently on the side of your head for a light stretch.
Hold 20 seconds. Switch sides.
Repeat 2 times per side.

exercises.name: Wall angels
instructions: Stand with your back against a wall, feet 6 inches out.
Press lower back, shoulders, and head to the wall.
Raise arms to a 'goal post' position and slowly slide them up and down.
Keep contact with the wall throughout. 10 reps.

exercises.name: Doorway chest stretch
instructions: Stand in a doorway, arms bent 90° resting on the frame.
Step one foot forward to feel a stretch across the chest.
Hold 30 seconds. Breathe slowly.
Repeat 2 times.

exercises.name: Cat-cow
instructions: Start on hands and knees, wrists under shoulders, knees under hips.
Inhale: arch your back, lift your chest and tailbone (cow).
Exhale: round your spine, tuck your chin (cat).
Flow for 10 slow breaths.

exercises.name: Thoracic extension over chair
instructions: Sit in a chair, hands behind your head.
Lift your chest and arch gently over the chair back.
Hold 3 seconds, then return.
Repeat 10 times.
